page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc8i.16xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon 6462C processor operating at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. The instance is configured with 64 dedicated physical cores and 64 vCPUs, utilizing a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio that ensures dedicated CPU allocation without hyperthreading.

The hardware profile includes 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. This low memory-to-CPU ratio aligns with compute-intensive workloads that require high processing power relative to memory footprint. The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, relying entirely on network-attached storage options. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and high clock speed provide predictable compute performance for workloads sensitive to CPU scheduling latency. The absence of bundled local storage and GPUs reduces overhead for architectures that do not require these components. This configuration is suitable for compute-heavy workloads such as high-traffic web serving, batch processing, and compute-intensive simulations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc8i.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance built on the KVM hypervisor and powered by an Intel Xeon 6462C processor. Operating at 3.3 GHz, the system provides 64 dedicated physical cores and 64 vCPUs with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, ensuring dedicated CPU allocation. It is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, establishing a 2.0 GB per core memory-to-CPU ratio. The instance features a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps, but does not include local storage or GPU hardware. This hardware profile is designed for compute-intensive workloads requiring predictable processing power, such as batch processing, high-traffic web serving, and distributed computing tasks that do not require local storage or GPU acceleration.

tagline: A dedicated sixty-four core compute-optimized instance featuring high-frequency Intel Xeon processors and sixty-four gigabits per second network bandwidth.
